name: PSIU-Protocol-Gnomonic-Resonance

on:
  push:
    branches: [ main ]
  workflow_dispatch: # Ti permette di avviarlo anche manualmente

jobs:
  crystallization:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout Code
        uses: actions/checkout@v3

      - name: Setup R
        uses: r-lib/actions/setup-r@v2
        with:
          use-public-rspm: true

      - name: Install Dependencies
        run: Rscript -e 'install.packages("simplextree")'

      - name: Run PSIU Runner (n=10.000)
        run: Rscript runner.R
